basic_details.job_title: Swami Atmanand Schools Assistant Teacher Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Swami Atmanand Schools Assistant Teacher Notification 2026 has been released on 29 May 2026 on the official website www.kondagaon.gov.in. A total of 13 vacancies have been announced through the Swami Atmanand Schools Assistant Teacher Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/OBC (Non-Creamy Layer): 5 years; Women: 10 years; PWD: as per GAD guidelines; Chhattisgarh residents: additional 5 years (max age 40 years)

qualification.education_qualification: Higher Secondary (12th) with minimum 45% marks in English medium, D.Ed/D.El.Ed/B.El.Ed, TET Primary Level passed
qualification.details: Assistant Teacher - Makdi School, Keshkal School, Farsgaon School, Mahatma Gandhi Ward School, Jamkotpara Kondagaon School, Lanjoda School, Konagud School, Vishrampuri School, Bansakot School: Higher Secondary Examination or D.Ed/D.El.Ed/B.El.Ed with minimum 45% marks from any recognized board in English medium. TET Primary level passed mandatory. All education in English medium. Assistant Teacher Science Laboratory - Vishrampuri School: Higher Secondary Examination with minimum 50% marks in Biology/Physics/Chemistry from any recognized board in English medium.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Assistant Teacher - Mahatma Gandhi Ward School
Assistant Teacher Science Laboratory - Vishrampuri School

salary_details.details: Assistant Teacher posts: Rs. 25300/- Per Month Assistant Teacher Science Laboratory post: Rs. 22400/- Per Month

selection_process: Merit List based on educational qualification marks (10th 40%
12th 60%) Document Verification Open Counseling for posting
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Swami Atmanand Schools Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.kondagaon.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
